nodes.label: Standalone Traefik stand-in for managed Traefik
nodes.rationale: Stands in for Hostinger's managed Traefik so docker-compose.yaml can be reproduced end-to-end on a plain VPS (TLS issuance, HTTP->HTTPS redirect, WebSocket upgrade, routing); also documents the HTTPS entrypoint, Let's Encrypt certresolver, shared Docker network, and long idleTimeout the platform Traefik must provide.
